rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE code are visible in the target AADL scope.
generic_rules: Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Write type scope guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs.
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or named constants are available.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the analyzed AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings should appear after relevant subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed ports or constants exist.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement in component types
